characters.name: Animaniacs
characters.description: Write the first paragraph of your page here.

characters.name: Axl Gator
characters.description: Axlis a character inTaz-Mania. He was voiced byRob Paulsen. A rather stupid gator, he andBullare a pair. He and Bull are trying to captureTazand take him to a zoo for the children. In "Sidekicked", it is revealed Axl is only pretending to be stupid. As a matter of fact, he is not onlywaysmarter then Bull, but he holds several college degrees. The reason he does this is to not only please Bull but also because he believes being a sidekick is his purpose in life, though this is never brought up again. Axl does have moments where he says something smart, but Bull tells him that "saying something smart is almost as bad as saying something stupid."

characters.name: Bull Gator
characters.description: Bull Gatoris the main antagonist ofTaz-Maniavoiced byJohn Astin. A bumbling alligator, Bull and his sidekickAxlare hunters and trappers intent on catchingTaz. The reason they do this is so he can become an attraction at the zoo to please the "zoo-going children." When their schemes ultimately fail, Bull uses them as opportunities to teach Axl "lessons", which involves him hitting Axl on the head whenever he says "something stupid".

characters.name: Bushwhacker Bob
characters.description: Bushwacker Bobis theTasmanian Devil's temperamental boss at theHotel Tazmania. He manages the place, which is run by hisMum. He often gets angry at Taz and routinely belittles his employees. Bob is somewhat reminiscent of John Cleese's hotel manager character Basil Fawlty, in both voice and demeanor.

characters.name: Constance Koala
characters.description: Constance Koalais a koala maid. She is a large, friendly, female koala who works as a maid at theHotel Tazmania. Constance is generally kindhearted and sweet, polite to everyone but a little scatterbrained.

characters.name: Constance Koala
characters.description: Constance Koalais a koala maid. She is a large, friendly, female koala who works as a maid at theHotel Tazmania. Constance is generally kindhearted and sweet, polite to everyone but a little scatterbrained.

characters.name: Digeri Dingo
characters.description: Digeri DingoNameDigeriSpeciesDingoesVoicesRob Paulsen Digeri Dingois a "friend" ofTaz, or so Taz believes. In reality, Digeri generally just uses Taz as a patsy to get whatever he wants. Digeri often tricks Taz into undertaking various dangerous schemes that end up harming and mutilating the Tasmanian Devil, while Digeri ends up getting the treasure. Digeri is essentially the sneaky, manipulative character type, who takes advantage of Taz's stupidity, misguided friendship, and loyalty to the dingo. Digeri's two favorite pastimes are scavenging for treasure and bottle cap collecting. He shares the latter of these interests with Taz, and the two often compete and trade with each other over bottle caps that have been collected. Many of their adventures were based upon Digeri tricking Taz into finding him a rare bottle cap, which he keeps.

characters.name: Drew
characters.description: Andrew "Drew" Tazmanian Devil(Maurice LaMarche) isTaz'suncle, who acts like Bob Hope and sometimes joins his brotherHughin playing golf. He and Hugh would occasionally travel together in episodes spoofing the Road to... movies, of which Bing Crosby and Bob Hope starred.

characters.name: Gorilla Brothers
characters.description: The Gorilla Brothersare two gorillas (big brother and little brother) who mitotically and mistakenly stalk, and attackTazandJakethroughout the segmentOh, Brotherof episode 19.  Big Brother Gorilla(Phil Proctor) is the larger, powerful, blissful, but seemingly weak minded older brother. He is often ruled by his younger brother's strong, but "fragile" psychological dominance and control. The constant goading by his little brother will subject him toTaz's rage and fury.

characters.name: Hugh
characters.description: Hugh Tazmanian Devil(Maurice LaMarche) isTaz'seasy-going father. In many cases meant to be a parody ofBing CrosbyandBob Hope. Hugh likes orange juice and playing golf. Crosby was a famous pitchman for orange juice, while Hope would perform stand-up comedy in golf attire. Hope and Crosby appeared together as a popular duo in many comedy films of the 1940s and 1950s. Hugh's voice typically sounds like Crosby and will often resort to saying"blah blah blah, yackity schmakity"to speed up his long-winded (often cliche) speeches.

characters.name: Hugh

characters.name: Jake
characters.description: Jacob "Jake" Tazmanian Devil(Debi Derryberry) isTazandMolly's little brother. Jake looks up to Taz. Jake is aBaracute Scoutwhich is a parody of Boy Scouts. He has an uncle namedDrew. He is voiced by Debi Derryberry, who is well known for voicing Jimmy Neutron from Jimmy Neutron series, Zatch Bell from Zatch Bell series, and Nergal, Jr. from Billy and Mandy series.

characters.name: Jean
characters.description: Jean Tazmanian Devil(Miriam Flynn) isTaz'sdedicated, doting mother who is also married toHugh.

characters.name: Jean
characters.description: Jean Tazmanian Devil(Miriam Flynn) isTaz'sdedicated, doting mother who is also married toHugh.

characters.name: Molly
characters.description: Molly Tazmanian Devil(Kellie Martin) isTaz'steenage sister. Despite being more refined than her brother, she often shares his vicious nature, though in a more sibling-rivalry sense. Molly is the middle child ofHughandJean. She enjoys talking to her friends on the phone, spending time with her family. Getting glammed up, listening to music on her walkman and other typical teenage stuff, like shopping. Although she argues with Taz, deep down inside she loves her brother and cares about him.

characters.name: Mr. Thickley
characters.description: Mr. Thickleyis a wallaby tour guide. He is one ofTaz's good friends. He speaks with an exaggerated Australian drawl, and true to his species hops everywhere. He claims to be an expert at all aspects of life, professions and experience, but in reality has no skill nor aptitude to back up his claims, often leading his friends or coworkers to disaster. Despite this, Mr. Thickley has a perpetual smile and friendly attitude, even in the most dangerous of situations. In addition to his job as tour guide, Mr. Thickley has occasionally served hosting roles in the various "Tazmanian Theater" episodes as well as "Pledge Dredge".

characters.name: Mum
characters.description: Mum the owner of the Hotel Tazmania MumisBushwhacker Bob's Mother, who manages theHotel Tazmania. She's the complete opposite of her son in every way. In contrast to her son, she doesn't have a big temper and is nicer to his employees, though she does insult Bob on a constant basis.

characters.name: Road Runner
characters.description: Road Runner is the main protagonist of the Road Runner cartoons fromLooney Tunes. Road appeared in the episode "Instant Replay", where he is caught byTaz, but thenBullandAxlarrived to kidnap Taz, so he lets the Road Runner go.

characters.name: Taz
characters.description: Taz (Jim Cummings)is the central character of the series and appears in every episode. The plots of most of the episodes are based upon the relationships various characters have with Taz. Taz is cast as a not-to-bright teenager in most episodes and is less ferocious than his original incarnation. He is sometimes portrayed as a vicious predator, consuming anything with an everlasting appetite scaring much of the native wildlife. Most of the time, Taz speaks in grunts, growls, and rasps, which other characters seem to understand and is able to spin like a tornado and break through many objects. He also has a calm and caring side to him seen when he is around his friends and family. Taz works as a bellhop at theHotel Tazmania. He likes food and Christmas a lot, but has a great dislike of water often voicing his displeasure with"Taz hate water". Taz, being a teenager, shares his house with his family - his dadHugh, his mumJean. He also has two siblings. His little sisterMollyand his little brotherJake.

characters.name: The Platypus Brothers
characters.description: Daniel (left) and Timothy (right) Platypus. As they appear in the series. DanielandTimothy Platypus(Rob Paulsen and Maurice LaMarche) are two orange platypus who work as amateur inventors inTaz-Mania. Daniel and Timothy are two orange platypus brothers who work as amateur inventors, as well as working in theHotel Tazmania, where they are in charge of maintenance, repair and installation of all sorts of equipment. They are nearly identical to each other, but Timothy wears glasses and his cap is always backwards. The Platypus Brothers are close friends withTaz, despite often causing trouble for him due to their malfunctioning contraptions. Being platypi, they enjoy swimming and their house is built above the water (which is also an occasional source of problems for Taz due to his hydrophobia). Their design and speech pattern slightly resemble Daffy Duck, and like Daffy the Platypus Brothers have a high opinion of themselves. Unlike Daffy, however, they are nearly always cheerful and optimistic and are driven by a genuine wish to help. Even when they fail miserably, they will often smile and find an excuse to consider the experiment a success. They are so proud of their work and so little in touch with reality that they often ignore the fact that their inventions frequently lead to Taz or other characters getting hurt.
